title: Happy Ghast Fireball
description: Happy Ghast Fireball lets you shoot ghast-style fireballs while riding a Happy Ghast
body:
Happy Ghast Fireball lets you shoot ghast-style fireballs while riding a Happy Ghast. Just hold a Blaze Rod and left-click (hit a block/entity or swing in the air) to launch a fireball in the direction you’re aiming.

It’s fully configurable:

    Cooldown between shots (ticks)
    Fireball speed
    Explosion power
    Nether-only mode (optional)
    Destroy blocks toggle: turn this off to make the explosion deal damage/knockback without block griefing (still plays explosion particles/sound)

Built for Fabric; ideal for servers that want fun combat without terrain damage.
